opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This black mole on my back just started bleeding onto my shirt today, and it looks completely different than it did a month ago. I'm terrified it's cancer.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A dark mole on my back started bleeding today and has changed a lot recently.

symptom_narrative.onset: was a small flat brown freckle; rapidly changed over ~8 weeks; bled today
symptom_narrative.character: a dark, uneven, raised mole that itched then bled
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: new itch then spontaneous bleeding; my spouse says it looks different from my other moles ('the odd one out')

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe sunburns in youth; several ordinary moles

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no blood thinners or regular medicines

objective_data_offered.value: an ~8-9mm dark mole on the upper back that is uneven in shape with a ragged/notched edge and several colours (black, brown, grey, some red at the edge); the raised centre oozed a little blood; looks different from my other moles
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot dermoscope, palpate depth, or assess lymph nodes

objective_data_offered.value: small amount of oozing that stopped with firm pressure and a dressing
